## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-generated content for PromptFoo and align on audience-specific improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content angle needs adjustment: Focus on security professionals' perspective, not code implementation](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [LLM limitations: Recent research may not be captured, requiring manual updates](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Improvement strategy: Use GPT-4.5 for writing, GPT-4.0 for judging; pass existing PromptFoo articles as context](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Content Rewrite and Feedback

  - [Vanessa rewrote parts of the article to better suit the target audience (security professionals)](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Reframe: Focus on risks, root causes, identification, and mitigation rather than code snippets](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Time efficiency: Vanessa found it quicker to rewrite than provide detailed feedback](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Persistent issue: Content is "almost there" but doesn't quite hit the mark for the target audience](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)

### Target Audience Needs

  - [Security professionals need: risk awareness, root causes, identification methods, mitigation strategies](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Less focus on code, more on outputs and configurations](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Example: Show LLM outputs demonstrating sensitive information disclosure, not the underlying code](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Content Structure Refinement

  - [Maintain focus on common attack vectors and security measures](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Earlier sections: Mention risks without diving into code details](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Emphasize subject matter over code implementation](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

### Industry Challenges

  - [Fast-moving field: New research (e.g., 3-week-old papers) may not be captured by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Manual effort sometimes necessary due to rapidly evolving industry knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

### Content Generation Improvements

  - [Currently using GPT and Claude for two passes, including style mirroring](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Challenge: Zeroing in on audience-specific needs in a granular way](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Suggestion: Experiment with GPT-4.5 for better emotional intelligence and writing quality](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Use GPT-4.0 to judge GPT-4.5's output for potential improvements](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

### Guidelines and Context

  - [OWASP guidelines remain the primary reference](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Recommendation: Pass previous PromptFoo articles as context for LLM to mirror persona and writing style](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vanessa to review pending articles and provide feedback on necessary changes](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [GrowthX to experiment with GPT-4.5 for content generation, if budget allows](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Continue using OWASP guidelines and existing PromptFoo articles as reference points](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine content focus on security professional perspective, emphasizing risks and mitigation strategies over code implementation](https://fathom.video/share/L69gbUqxwnFx5zw6wdR7HksyDKhL7zdg?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
